Container.Name: BrayDashy-Dashboard
Container.Overview: A custom, beautiful, and highly dynamic unraid landing page dashboard for your server apps. Features a real-time reactive UI, 4 interchangeable layout styles, and live infrastructure metrics.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port the dashboard is accessible on

Config.Name: App Data Config
Config.Description: Persistent storage location for your dashboard links, categories, and settings.
